info.title: AlKhair Mobile API - Complete
info.description: Complete collection for every route in routes/api.php. Login stores the Sanctum bearer token automatically. Requests inherit Bearer {{token}} unless marked otherwise.

post.description: Creates a Laravel Sanctum token. User must be active and have at least one API-enabled permission.

delete.description: Revokes the bearer token used for this request.

get.description: Requires an active parent profile linked to the authenticated account.

delete.description: Permission: students.delete. Fails with 422 while enrollments exist.
Permission: groups.delete. Fails when linked enrollments or schedules exist.

post.description: Permission: attendance.student.take. Records must belong to active enrollments in this group.
Permission: quran-tests.record or quran-awqaf-tests.record depending on test type.
Permission: points.create-manual. Negative values require a point type that allows negatives.
Permission: assessment-results.record. score max is the assessment total mark.
